channel.title: Ashwin Labs Notes
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Ashwin Labs Notes

item.title: How AI Agents Plan - From Random Actions to Structured Execution
item.description: Why Planning Matters Most agent demos look impressive… until they don’t.

item.title: Memory in AI Agents - Why Stateless Systems Feel Dumb
item.description: Why Memory Matters Most AI systems feel smart… until you use them twice. You tell it something once. Then you have to tell it again. And again.

item.title: When Not to Use Agents
item.description: Why This Matters Agents are everywhere right now. And that’s the problem. People are reaching for agents before they understand the tradeoffs.

item.title: Tool Calling and Function Calling
item.description: Why Tools Matter A language model on its own is limited.

item.title: Building Reliable Agent Workflows
item.description: Why Reliability Matters Agent demos look impressive. Until they don’t.

item.title: Prompt Engineering Techniques That Actually Work
item.description: And why most advice online misses the point The Moment Prompt Engineering Clicks Most people start prompt engineering like this: “Explain gradient descent.” And sometimes, that works.

item.title: Deconstructing the AI Agent
item.description: “AI agent” has become one of those terms that sounds impressive but often hides more than it explains. A chatbot is called an agent.

item.title: AI Systems Thinking
item.description: Start Here Most people approach AI like this: Write a prompt Hope it works Tweak wording That works… until it doesn’t.

item.title: Not All AI Agents Are the Same - A Practical Guide to Agent Types
item.description: There is a strange thing that happens once a technical idea becomes popular. The word starts getting used for everything.

item.title: mermaid-cheatsheet
item.description: Mermaid Cheatsheet (Quartz-Safe) Summary Mermaid lets you create diagrams using plain text.
